candidates.name: sitegoat
unresolved_questions: What is the actual regulatory/clinical status (submission vs approval)?

data_dictionary.actor_project_relation: Relationship between the author and the project (self, employee, unrelated).
data_dictionary.announcement_attribution: Who made the claim (direct builder, third party, commentary).
data_dictionary.artifact_types: Type of each external artifact (repository, documentation, product website, live demo).
data_dictionary.artifact_urls: Public product, documentation, or repository links extracted from the Post.
data_dictionary.company_status: Human-readable status derived from the disposition.
data_dictionary.evidence_levels: Evidence levels present on the Post (A strongest, D weakest).
data_dictionary.headline_mandate_fit: Fit with the AI Infrastructure and Software mandate.
data_dictionary.lead_disposition: Engine routing decision for the lead.
data_dictionary.name: Normalized company or project name derived by the engine.
data_dictionary.post_url: Direct permalink to the original public X Post.
data_dictionary.research_score: Deterministic 0 to 100 organizing score. Not an investment score.
data_dictionary.sector_bucket: Sector assigned from the matching query family.
data_dictionary.source_queries: Query families whose results included this project.

featured.disposition_note: The engine organized the evidence and structured the comparison. The scorecard was a decision aid, not the decision. ScaleDown scored higher on the standardized framework. AOS was advanced by human investment judgment for focused diligence, not funded.
featured.name: AOS / Unicity Labs

public_facts.claim: Unicity protocol (bearer-token settlement) is the live public product
Public GitHub organization with multiple repositories
AOS as a distinct enterprise product is a working thesis, not a confirmed brand

featured.summary: Zug-based team behind the Unicity protocol, a bearer-token peer-to-peer settlement layer. AOS is the working thesis for a secure agent execution, identity, policy, and proof layer beneath autonomous agents. Selected from the comparison set by human judgment, not by an automated score.
featured.thesis_note: The full investment thesis, underwriting model, and diligence playbook are maintained privately and are not published in this showcase.
unresolved_questions: What is AOS today, and how does it relate to the Unicity protocol, the SDK, and bearer tokens?
Is there paid enterprise demand, and who is the economic buyer?
Which entity captures equity value if the protocol succeeds?
Is the announced seed still open, and when is the next financing?

notes: Raw Post text, author names, usernames, author ids, and profile fields are intentionally excluded.
Only engine-derived classifications plus public permalinks and public artifact URLs are shown.

provenance.note: Generated from saved completed-run outputs by build_sanitized_demo_data.py.
